response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development with a strong background in C/C++ (National Instruments, embedded systems), but his recent roles have focused heavily on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and web/mobile development. His expertise in C++ is not recent or deep enough for a Senior C++ Developer role in industrial automation. While he demonstrates architectural and problem-solving skills, his lack of clear experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), message brokers, or cloud platforms (Azure) raises concerns. His strengths in agile methodologies and cross-functional collaboration are valuable but not sufficient to offset the gaps.
strengths: Strong C/C++ experience from early career (National Instruments, embedded systems)
Proven track record in scalable system design (Pinepoint Systems, Dunnhumby)
Deep knowledge of agile practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last significant role was 2015)
No explicit mention of industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) or message brokers
Minimal cloud platform experience (Azure not listed; AWS CDK is present but not industrial cloud solutions)
